mapper.select: SELECT user_id, password, nick_name, email, bio, status, background FROM user_info WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT user_id, password, nick_name, email, bio, status, background FROM user_info WHERE nick_name = #{nickName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_info (user_id, password, nick_name, email, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{status})
